name: Shadow Imp

polish_details.material_upgrade: procedural PBR (noise/voronoi textures, color ramps, bump, emission)
polish_details.lighting: enemy studio (cool violet key, red fill, white rim)

style_guide_alignment.silhouette: Angular violet-black body, jagged not round
style_guide_alignment.attack_tell: Red-violet glowing orb + eye glow telegraphs attacks
style_guide_alignment.defeat_feedback: Gold dissolve material for reclaimed light on death
style_guide_alignment.readability: Small fast enemy, distinct from hero's warm palette

next_gate: UE5 import, animation skeleton, AI behavior, Play-In-Editor combat test
